# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import inspect
from sqlglot.dialects.databricks import Databricks
from sqlglot.dialects.dialect import groupconcat_sql
from sqlglot import exp

def test_databricks_generator_uses_groupconcat_sql_transform_directly__a1():
    """
    The Databricks generator should map exp.GroupConcat directly to the shared
    groupconcat_sql transform function (not wrap it in a lambda).
    """
    transform = Databricks.Generator.TRANSFORMS.get(exp.GroupConcat)
    assert transform is groupconcat_sql, 'Databricks.Generator.TRANSFORMS[exp.GroupConcat] should be the groupconcat_sql function object'

def test_databricks_generator_uses_groupconcat_sql_transform_directly__a2():
    """
    The Databricks generator should map exp.GroupConcat directly to the shared
    groupconcat_sql transform function (not wrap it in a lambda).
    """
    transform = Databricks.Generator.TRANSFORMS.get(exp.GroupConcat)
    assert not inspect.isfunction(transform) or transform.__name__ == 'groupconcat_sql', 'GroupConcat transform should not be a wrapper/lambda; it should be the named groupconcat_sql function'
